title: Principal Frontend Developer at KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies in Gwalior offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies:
KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPIT Technologies Digital Technologies!
